Hero.subTitle1: We deliver advanced fire protection and alarm systems designed to meet the highest international standards, ensuring safety for people and property while minimizing risks across all types of facilities.
Hero.subTitle2: Our services cover design, supply, installation, and maintenance of safety systems and surveillance solutions, handled by a specialized team committed to top-quality execution.
Hero.subTitle3: We build lasting relationships with our clients through reliable solutions, continuous technical support, and a strong commitment to quality—helping ensure business continuity and reduce long-term costs.

About.history_p1: Aura Secure is your trusted partner for achieving the highest standards of security, safety, and fire protection. We believe protecting people and property is essential for business continuity and growth.
About.history_p2: Founded by a team of industry experts with over 20 years of cumulative experience, we provide comprehensive solutions from design to operation and maintenance.
About.history_p3: We have executed major projects across service and industrial sectors, implementing full fire protection and alarm systems including pumps, sprinklers, and advanced early-warning systems.
About.feature_1_desc: We are officially certified by Saudi Civil Defense; our systems conform to UL, FM, SBC and NFPA standards.
About.feature_2_desc: We partner with leading manufacturers and suppliers approved by SASO to ensure top-quality equipment.
About.feature_3_desc: We build long-term relationships by offering high-quality execution and competitive pricing, making safety a smart investment.
About.vision_text: To be a leading national provider of trusted safety and fire protection solutions, recognized for reliability, technical excellence, and continuous innovation.
About.mission_text: Deliver integrated, code-compliant safety systems with professional engineering, timely execution, and ongoing support to protect people and assets.

Services.detail_note: For inquiries about this service, please contact our team.
Services.Services_2: Integrated security solutions to the highest standards
Services.S1_Desc: Supply and installation of advanced fire alarm systems compliant with international standards.
Services.S2_Desc: Design and implementation of water, foam, and gas (FM200) suppression systems.
Services.S3_Desc: Preventive and corrective maintenance services to ensure system readiness.
Services.S4_Desc: Integrated CCTV and access control solutions.
Services.S5_Desc: Engineering drawings, evacuation maps, and safety equipment layout.
Services.CTA_Desc: We reach you anywhere in the Kingdom to ensure the highest safety standards.
Services.map_section_title: Protect your facility and safeguard your investment today
Services.map_section_desc: Let Aura-Secure engineers in Riyadh and across the Kingdom provide certified and customized engineering solutions for your building's security and safety requirements

Stats.cta_desc: With our certified systems and extended engineering experience, we have the numbers and statistics to protect your facility to the highest international and local standards.

Projects.P1_Title: Water-based suppression networks for large logistics warehouses
Projects.P2_Title: Addressable fire alarm systems for an integrated office tower
Projects.P3_Title: Maintenance and safety system testing contract for a hospital
Projects.P4_Title: Automatic suppression for server rooms in a factory
Projects.P5_Title: Approved safety designs and plans for a retail complex
Projects.P6_Title: Smart surveillance systems for an open shopping mall
Projects.P7_Title: Maintenance contracts for early-warning systems across 12 educational facilities
Projects.P8_Title: Installation of certified fire pumps at a petrochemicals warehouse

Process.Process_2: Thoughtful steps that ensure the highest safety levels
Process.Step1_Desc: Our team visits the site to evaluate risks and precisely determine technical requirements.
Process.Step2_Desc: Preparation of engineering drawings and hydraulic calculations in compliance with building codes.
Process.Step3_Desc: Using globally certified equipment installed by specialized technicians under engineering supervision.
Process.Step4_Desc: System commissioning and obtaining required approvals and certifications from relevant authorities.

Testimonials.Testimonials_2: What they say about Aura Secure
Testimonials.T1_Text: High professionalism and precise adherence to delivery schedules. The firefighting systems installed work efficiently and were certified by Civil Defense without remarks.
Testimonials.T2_Text: Their maintenance team is outstanding, very fast response and innovative technical solutions. I feel fully secure with their periodic maintenance contracts.
Testimonials.T3_Text: One of the best companies we've worked with for safety plan implementation. Attention to detail and deep understanding of the Saudi Building Code.

Contact.Contact_2: Have a question? We are here to answer and assist you immediately
Contact.info_location_desc: Kingdom of Saudi Arabia - Riyadh, Al-Khalidiyah district, intersection of Prince Mohammed bin Abdulrahman Street and Al-Kharj Road.
Contact.info_hours_desc: Sunday to Thursday: 08:00 AM to 05:00 PM
Contact.faq_q1: Are your systems and solutions certified?
Contact.faq_a1: Yes, all fire-fighting and security systems we supply and install are fully certified by Saudi Civil Defense and relevant authorities, matching the highest international standards and specifications.
Contact.faq_q2: How can I get a quotation for my project?
Contact.faq_a2: You can fill the form attached next to the section with your project details, or send engineering drawings by email. Our engineering team will review and respond with a comprehensive proposal within 24 hours.
Contact.faq_q3: Do you offer periodic maintenance after installation?
Contact.faq_a3: Certainly, we provide flexible periodic maintenance contracts (quarterly and annual) to ensure system readiness and compliance with safety requirements.
Contact.faq_a4: We provide integrated engineering and execution services covering all regions and cities across the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia, with fast response for major and critical projects.

Footer.Footer_Desc: Leading, certified solutions in security engineering, safety systems and fire protection to safeguard your facilities with the latest smart technologies.
